activities_projects.title: Identify Democratic Institutions
activities_projects.objective: Understand key institutions in a democracy
steps: Read the section about institutions in the chapter
List the three major institutions of government
Write one function of each institution

activities_projects.title: Flow Chart of Policy Decision
activities_projects.objective: Understand how major policy decisions are taken
steps: Read the Mandal Commission decision example
Identify the steps involved in the decision making
Draw a flow chart showing the process
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the decision-making process in government

activities_projects.title: Parliament Structure Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Learn the structure of the Indian Parliament
steps: Draw a diagram showing the structure of Parliament
Include Lok Sabha, Rajya Sabha and the President
Label their roles

activities_projects.title: Role Play on Parliament Debate
steps: Divide students into government and opposition groups
Select a topic for discussion
Conduct a short mock debate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of discussion and debate

activities_projects.title: Compare Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha
activities_projects.objective: Differentiate the two houses of Parliament
steps: Draw a table with two columns
List features such as members, term and powers
Write at least five differences

activities_projects.title: Executive Structure Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the structure of the executive
steps: List the components of the executive
Include President, Prime Minister and Council of Ministers
Prepare a labeled chart

activities_projects.title: Prime Minister Responsibilities List
activities_projects.objective: Learn the powers of the Prime Minister
steps: Read the section on Prime Minister
Write at least five responsibilities
Explain any one responsibility briefly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of the Prime Minister

activities_projects.title: Judiciary Hierarchy Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the structure of the judiciary
steps: Draw the hierarchy of courts in India
Include Supreme Court, High Courts and District Courts
Label each level

activities_projects.title: Newspaper Activity
steps: Collect a news article related to government decisions
Identify whether it relates to legislature, executive or judiciary
Paste and write a short explanation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Relates textbook concepts to current events

activities_projects.title: Institution Matching Activity
steps: Write names of institutions on cards
Write their functions on separate cards
Match the institution with its function
